subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand fast in the Covenant! It is the afternoon hour, and this servant, beside the garden, is occupied with the remembrance of the divine friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان وقت عصر است و این عبد در کنار حدیقه بذکر یاران الهی مشغول
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
